remarks: Beautifully-maintained single-family home offers the perfect blend of convenience, comfort, and opportunity. Ideally situated within walking distance of the Springdale Train Station. Thoughtfully updated for peace of mind, major improvements include a newer roof, central air conditioning, boiler, and efficient gas heating, ensuring year-round comfort and energy efficiency. Main-level washer and dryer makes everyday living even easier. The flexible walk-out lower level provides endless possibilities. Whether you're looking for an in-law setup, home office, playroom or just more flex space. This inviting home is designed to accommodate a variety of lifestyles. Outside, you'll find a detached heated one-car garage, a spacious driveway with ample off-street parking, plus additional gravel parking in front of the home-ideal for multiple vehicles, guests, or tenants. Whether you're seeking a commuter-friendly residence, a smart investment opportunity, or a home with room to grow, this property delivers. Conveniently located near transportation, shopping, dining, schools and local amenities, this is a rare opportunity to own a versatile home in a highly desirable location. It is a Must See!
